features: Adidas Energy Kick Shower Gel for Women with Orange Essential Oils 250 ml
Benefits: protects, moisturises and gives an instant energising feeling, also suitable for sensitive skin
Directions for use: apply to damp skin and massage in; rinse thoroughly with cold water
Formula: vegan and dermatologically tested, without aluminium salts and without alcohol, enriched with glycerine and hyaluronic acid for quick skin recovery
Sustainable: refillable bottle, made from 100% recycled plastic
Adidas Active skin and mind: the adidas active product range that wants to put your skin and mind at the centre; your support system that can make sports a real and unique pleasure
description: Product Description Adidas Active Skin & Mind is the active range from Adidas that work just as hard as you. Adidas, the real sports brand for men and women, offers a new line of care for the person who wants to put their skin at the centre of attention 24/7. Active Skin & Mind ensures rapid skin recovery and activates the mind. The adidas Energy Kick shower gel is a shower foam for women, enriched with essential orange oils. Protects, moisturises and gives an instant energising feeling, also suitable for sensitive skin. Vegan and dermatologically tested formula, without aluminium salts and without alcohol, enriched with glycerine and hyaluronic acid for quick skin recovery. The bottle is refillable, made from 100% recycled plastic Ingredients Aqua/Water/Eau, Sodium C14-16 Olefin Sulfonate, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Parfum/Fragrance, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hyaluronate, Yellow 5 (CI 19140), Red 4 (CI 14700)
